name: Water
function: Base solvent

name: Glycerin
function: Attracts and retains moisture in the skin

name: Hyaluronic Acid
function: Powerful hydration — holds up to 1000x its weight in water

name: Niacinamide
function: Brightening, pore-minimizing, strengthens skin barrier, reduces redness

name: Ceramide NP
function: Repairs and strengthens skin barrier

name: Ceramide AP
function: Skin barrier repair, smooths skin texture

name: Ceramide EOP
function: Maintains skin barrier integrity

name: Retinol
function: Anti-aging — boosts collagen, reduces wrinkles, improves texture

name: Salicylic Acid
function: Unclogs pores, treats acne, oil-soluble exfoliant

name: Glycolic Acid
function: Chemical exfoliant, improves texture and brightens

name: Lactic Acid
function: Gentle AHA exfoliant, hydrating, brightening

name: Vitamin C
function: Antioxidant, brightening, collagen synthesis, UV protection support

name: Tocopherol
function: Antioxidant, moisturizing, protects against UV damage

name: Panthenol
function: Soothing, hydrating, wound healing support

name: Allantoin
function: Soothes and calms irritated skin, promotes cell regeneration

name: Centella Asiatica
function: Anti-inflammatory, wound healing, skin barrier repair

name: Tea Tree Oil
function: Antibacterial, anti-acne

name: Squalane
function: Lightweight moisturizer, mimics skin's natural oils

name: Jojoba Oil
function: Moisturizing, balances oil production, similar to skin sebum

name: Shea Butter
function: Rich moisturizer, anti-inflammatory, skin barrier support

name: Petrolatum
function: Creates protective barrier, prevents moisture loss

name: Dimethicone
function: Smoothing, creates protective film, non-comedogenic silicone

name: Cyclomethicone
function: Lightweight silicone, gives silky feel, helps product spread

name: Zinc Oxide
function: Physical/mineral UV filter — broad spectrum UVA+UVB protection

name: Titanium Dioxide
function: Physical/mineral UV filter — primarily UVB protection

name: Avobenzone
function: Chemical UVA filter

name: Octinoxate
function: Chemical UVB filter

name: Homosalate
function: Chemical UVB filter

name: Azelaic Acid
function: Anti-acne, brightening, anti-rosacea, gentle exfoliant

name: Benzoyl Peroxide
function: Kills acne-causing bacteria, unclogs pores

name: Tranexamic Acid
function: Reduces hyperpigmentation, brightening

name: Alpha Arbutin
function: Brightening, inhibits melanin production

name: Kojic Acid
function: Brightening, reduces dark spots

name: Peptides
function: Anti-aging — stimulate collagen production, firm skin

name: Bakuchiol
function: Plant-based retinol alternative — anti-aging without irritation

name: Snail Mucin
function: Hydrating, wound healing, improves skin texture

name: Aloe Vera
function: Soothing, hydrating, anti-inflammatory

name: Green Tea Extract
function: Antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, UV protection support

name: Resveratrol
function: Antioxidant, anti-aging, protects against environmental damage

name: Ferulic Acid
function: Antioxidant, boosts effectiveness of Vitamins C and E

name: Coenzyme Q10
function: Antioxidant, energizes skin cells, anti-aging

name: Collagen
function: Moisturizing on skin surface (cannot penetrate skin when applied topically)

name: Urea
function: Hydrating, gentle exfoliant at higher concentrations, repairs skin barrier

name: Propolis
function: Antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, healing, rich in antioxidants

name: Honey
function: Humectant, antibacterial, soothing

name: Rice Extract
function: Brightening, antioxidant, moisturizing

name: Licorice Root Extract
function: Brightening, anti-inflammatory, soothes redness

name: Rosehip Oil
function: Rich in Vitamin A and C, anti-aging, moisturizing, fades scars

name: Argan Oil
function: Moisturizing, anti-aging, rich in Vitamin E and fatty acids

name: Coconut Oil
function: Moisturizing, antibacterial

name: Mineral Oil
function: Occlusive moisturizer, prevents water loss

name: Lanolin
function: Heavy moisturizer, mimics skin lipids

name: Cetyl Alcohol
function: Fatty alcohol — thickener, emollient, NOT drying alcohol

name: Cetearyl Alcohol
function: Fatty alcohol — emollient, thickener, stabilizer

name: Stearic Acid
function: Fatty acid — emollient, stabilizer, cleanser

name: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride
function: Lightweight emollient derived from coconut oil

name: Sodium Hyaluronate Crosspolymer
function: Long-lasting hydration, larger molecule form of HA

name: Madecassic Acid
function: Derived from Centella Asiatica — collagen synthesis, wound healing

name: Asiatic Acid
function: Derived from Centella Asiatica — anti-aging, promotes collagen

name: Mugwort
function: Calming, anti-inflammatory, antioxidant — popular in K-beauty

name: Sulfur
function: Anti-acne, antibacterial, drying for oily skin

name: Witch Hazel
function: Astringent, tightens pores, can be drying

name: Alcohol Denat
function: Quick-drying solvent — can be drying and irritating, disrupts skin barrier

name: Fragrance
function: Added scent — common allergen, no skincare benefit

name: Essential Oils
function: Natural fragrance and minor actives — potential irritant and sensitizer

name: Parabens
function: Preservative — effective but controversial, linked to endocrine disruption concerns

name: Phenoxyethanol
function: Common preservative — generally well tolerated

name: Sodium Benzoate
function: Preservative — mild, generally safe

name: Potassium Sorbate
function: Preservative — gentle, food-grade safe

name: Ethylhexylglycerin
function: Preservative booster, skin conditioning

name: DMDM Hydantoin
function: Formaldehyde-releasing preservative — controversial, can cause irritation

name: Sodium Lauryl Sulfate
function: Strong cleanser/foaming agent — can strip skin and cause irritation

name: Sodium Laureth Sulfate
function: Milder foaming cleanser than SLS but still potentially irritating

name: Cocamidopropyl Betaine
function: Gentle cleanser derived from coconut oil

name: Decyl Glucoside
function: Very gentle plant-derived cleanser

name: Coco-Glucoside
function: Mild coconut-derived surfactant

name: Polysorbate 20
function: Emulsifier — helps oil and water mix

name: Carbomer
function: Thickener and gel-forming agent

name: Xanthan Gum
function: Natural thickener and stabilizer

name: Sodium PCA
function: Natural moisturizing factor (NMF) component — attracts moisture

name: Betaine
function: Humectant, osmoprotectant, soothing

name: Cholesterol
function: Skin-identical lipid, barrier repair, enhances ceramide function

name: Phytosphingosine
function: Skin-identical lipid, antimicrobial, barrier repair

name: Adenosine
function: Anti-wrinkle, anti-inflammatory, wound healing

name: Caffeine
function: Reduces puffiness, constricts blood vessels, antioxidant

name: Turmeric
function: Anti-inflammatory, brightening, antioxidant

name: Charcoal
function: Draws out impurities, absorbs excess oil

name: Kaolin
function: Gentle clay — absorbs oil without over-drying

name: Bentonite
function: Strong clay — absorbs oil and impurities, deep cleansing

name: Citric Acid
function: pH adjuster, mild exfoliant at high concentrations

name: Butylene Glycol
function: Humectant, solvent, helps product penetration

name: Propylene Glycol
function: Humectant, penetration enhancer — can irritate sensitive skin

name: PEG Compounds
function: Emulsifier, penetration enhancer — some concerns about contamination

name: Isopropyl Myristate
function: Emollient — can clog pores

name: Isopropyl Palmitate
function: Emollient — moderately comedogenic

name: Ethylhexyl Palmitate
function: Emollient and skin conditioner

name: CI 77891
function: White pigment used in makeup

name: Iron Oxides
function: Red/yellow/black pigments for makeup

name: Mica
function: Mineral pigment — adds shimmer and color

name: Talc
function: Oil absorber, texture enhancer — some contamination concerns

name: Bisabolol
function: Anti-inflammatory, soothing, derived from chamomile

name: Chamomile Extract
function: Calming, anti-inflammatory, antioxidant

name: Oat Extract
function: Soothing, anti-itch, repairs skin barrier — great for eczema

name: Calendula Extract
function: Wound healing, anti-inflammatory, soothing

name: Willow Bark Extract
function: Natural source of salicylic acid — gentle exfoliant, anti-acne

name: BHT
function: Antioxidant preservative — some controversy over safety

name: EDTA
function: Chelating agent — stabilizes product formulation

name: Sodium Hydroxide
function: pH adjuster — safe in final product formulation

name: Triethanolamine
function: pH adjuster and emulsifier
